message:
chore(phase2c): refresh FT-P2C-005 optimization profiling artifacts with latest benchmark run

Re-run of the FT-P2C-005 cpu-kernel fixture preload optimization benchmark
with updated numbers reflecting current system state:

- bd-3v0.16.8_profile_v1.md: updated profiling note with new benchmark deltas
- optimization_delta_v1.json: refreshed baseline/post/delta/improvement values
  (e.g., p95 reduction improved from 14.7% to 30.1%)
- optimization_isomorphism_v1.md: updated isomorphism guardrail documentation
- e2e_replay_forensics_linkage_v1.json: updated generation timestamp
- fixture_manifest.json: new artifact cataloging test fixtures used
- unit_property_coverage_v1.json: new artifact documenting unit/property test
  coverage for the optimization packet

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 # FT-P2C-005 Profiling Note — bd-3v0.16.8
 
-Generated: `2026-02-16T04:03:08Z`
+Generated: `2026-02-16T04:08:07Z`
 
 ## Objective
 
@@ -17,15 +17,15 @@ The comparator test executes both legacy and optimized paths in the same process
 ## Raw Comparator Output
 
 ```text
-packet_e2e_microbench_compare_ns packet=FT-P2C-005 legacy_p50=4809861 legacy_p95=5100683 legacy_p99=5100683 legacy_mean=4880602 optimized_p50=4218929 optimized_p95=4351767 optimized_p99=4351767 optimized_mean=4237366
+packet_e2e_microbench_compare_ns packet=FT-P2C-005 legacy_p50=10282230 legacy_p95=14150815 legacy_p99=14150815 legacy_mean=10814785 optimized_p50=9629848 optimized_p95=9885917 optimized_p99=9885917 optimized_mean=9232517
 ```
 
 ## Delta Summary
 
-- `p50`: `-590932ns` (`12.286%` faster)
-- `p95`: `-748916ns` (`14.683%` faster)
-- `p99`: `-748916ns` (`14.683%` faster)
-- `mean`: `-643236ns` (`13.179%` faster)
+- `p50`: `-652382ns` (`6.345%` faster)
+- `p95`: `-4264898ns` (`30.139%` faster)
+- `p99`: `-4264898ns` (`30.139%` faster)
+- `mean`: `-1582268ns` (`14.631%` faster)
 
 ## Isomorphism Guardrails

 ## Benchmark Delta (`packet_e2e_microbench_cpu_kernel_legacy_vs_optimized_profiles`)
 
-- Baseline (legacy fixture-loading path): `p50=4809861ns`, `p95=5100683ns`, `p99=5100683ns`, `mean=4880602ns`
-- Post (optimized preload path): `p50=4218929ns`, `p95=4351767ns`, `p99=4351767ns`, `mean=4237366ns`
-- Improvement: `p50=12.286% reduction`, `p95=14.683% reduction`, `p99=14.683% reduction`, `mean=13.179% reduction`
+- Baseline (legacy fixture-loading path): `p50=10282230ns`, `p95=14150815ns`, `p99=14150815ns`, `mean=10814785ns`
